title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF SANTA PRAXEDES, FORMERLY LANGAÃGAN, IN THE PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, INTO A REGULAR MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17447 / 66 OG No. 12, 2813 (March 23, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5968, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF SANTA PRAXEDES, FORMERLY LANGAÃGAN, IN THE PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, INTO A REGULAR MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipal District of Santa Praxedes, formerly Langañgan, in the Province of Cagayan, is hereby converted into a regular municipality, to foe known as the Municipality of Santa Praxedes.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 21, 1969.
